query:
UPDATE files
            SET 
                file_size = $1,
                original_size = $2,
                hash_blake3 = $3,
                is_compressed = $4,
                is_encrypted = $5,
                compression_algorithm = $6,
                encryption_algorithm = $7,
                compression_ratio = $8,
                compression_level = $9,
                cache_status = $10,
                cache_hits = $11,
                cache_priority = $12,
                last_cache_update = $13,
                last_accessed = $14,
                access_count = $15
            WHERE id = $16
